title: かわいかったら見に来てね☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm eating lunch at the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hiya! Sorry to bother you during your lunch
break! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to give you a flyer for my concert and a
headshot of myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, I'm doing a street performance
tonight, so I'm spreading the word about it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm just doing what I can to get my name out
there, even if it takes a while to catch on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The photo comes with a secret bonus too! If you
scan the code on the back...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You can download my voice to set as your alarm
clock! Yaaaay! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, download it now and give it a whirl! Don't
you want to be woken up every morning by the
voice of an angel?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wait, hold up! Why are you running away?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! You must be teasing me because I'm
so cute!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Two can play at that game! Ready or not,
here I come! Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! Now no one can stop me from
downloading the file to your phone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She grabs my phone and changes my alarm's
ringtone to her voice.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! If you like my voice, feel free to stop by my
performance tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning my phone, Smart Falcon heads off
to enthusiastically promote her performance to
the rest of the students in the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aww, thanks! As a reward for downloading it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Love, love! ☆ Kiss! ☆ Love, kiss, kiss! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Cute, isn't it? I hope you drop by my
street performance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon heads off to enthusiastically
promote her performance to the rest of the
students in the cafeteria with a flurry of love and
kisses.
